# itertools

> The concrete iterator types.

## API Reference

- [itertools::structs](/docs/rust-itertools/pkg-itertools-itertools-structs.html): The concrete iterator types.
- [itertools](/docs/rust-itertools/pkg-itertools-itertools.html): Extra iterator adaptors, functions and macros.
- [itertools::traits](/docs/rust-itertools/pkg-itertools-itertools-traits.html): Traits helpful for using certain `Itertools` methods in generic contexts.
- [itertools](/docs/rust-itertools/pkg-itertools.html): Rust API for itertools (2912 items across 3 modules).
- [Doctests](/docs/rust-itertools/doctests.html): Aggregated doctests across the workspace.
- [API Reference](/docs/rust-itertools/): Rust API across 1 crate.
